examples: Cryopreservation may be the last chance for the hellbender, aka the snot otter.
There are only two species related to the hellbender: the Chinese giant salamander (picture) and the Japanese giant salamander, which are also in decline.
Quite an improvement from a 1996 lineup dominated by eminently forgettable titles like Hellbender and Deadly Tide.
"Our menu items are pretty low in price, and we just felt like we were being killed with credit-card charges, " says Melissa Borowitz, co-owner of Hellbender Burritos in Davis, W.Va.
About 70% of Hellbender's customers pay with plastic.
